base_components.name: 24V high-CRI LED strip
base_components.note: CRI ≥ 95, 24V linear strip, cut to lamp-head length

base_components.name: Aluminum channel + opal diffuser
base_components.note: Heat sink + recessed diffuser, M3-compatible mounting wings

base_components.name: 24V power adapter
base_components.note: Desktop brick or wall-plug style depending on region

base_components.name: Wires / screws / M3 inserts
base_components.note: Heat-set threaded inserts, M3 screws, 22 AWG wire

base_components.name: Base + arm mock
base_components.note: Gooseneck or hinged arm mock with weighted base

color_finishing.name: Palace Red
color_finishing.note: Pigmented red + clear protective coat, two-step

calculation_notes: Finishing cost depends on color coat complexity, not shell shape.
All numbers are US-dollar estimates for a single prototype; volume production changes dramatically.
assumptions: 3D printed shell in PETG or PLA+ on a mid-size FDM printer.
No custom electronics or PCB design; off-the-shelf LED controller.
No shipping, customs, or labor cost included.
No tool wear, failed prints, or re-prints budgeted.
